# PLANNR

PLANNR is a software specification generator and startup planning tool for vibe coding workflows.

## Primary Pages

- https://plannr.in/
- https://plannr.in/pricing
- https://plannr.in/examples
- https://plannr.in/docs

## What PLANNR Does

- Turns rough ideas into PRDs, software specs, architecture docs, and API specifications.
- Helps founders and product teams move from prompt to plan faster.
- Supports startup planning, AI product management, and software architecture discovery.

## Audience

- Founders
- Product managers
- Indie hackers
- Startup teams
- Developers using vibe coding workflows

## Best Entry Points

- Start here if you want to build immediately: https://plannr.in/build
- Start here if you want examples: https://plannr.in/examples
